title: PermissionFile
description: Permission file that can define a default permission, a set of permissions or a list of inlined permissions.

default.description: The default permission set for the plugin

set.description: A list of permissions sets defined

DefaultPermission.description:
The default permission set of the plugin.

Works similarly to a permission with the "default" identifier.

description.description: Human-readable description of what the permission does.

PermissionSet.description: A set of direct permissions grouped together under a new name.

Permission.description: Descriptions of explicit privileges of commands.

oneOf.description: Enables the open_camera command without any pre-configured scope.
Denies the open_camera command without any pre-configured scope.
Enables the close_camera command without any pre-configured scope.
Denies the close_camera command without any pre-configured scope.
Enables the start_scan command without any pre-configured scope.
Denies the start_scan command without any pre-configured scope.
Enables the stop_scan command without any pre-configured scope.
Denies the stop_scan command without any pre-configured scope.
Enables the check_permissions command without any pre-configured scope.
Denies the check_permissions command without any pre-configured scope.
Enables the request_permissions command without any pre-configured scope.
Denies the request_permissions command without any pre-configured scope.
Enables the open_app_settings command without any pre-configured scope.
Denies the open_app_settings command without any pre-configured scope.

This permission set configures which scanleaf features are exposed by default.

#### Granted Permissions

Grants access to all camera lifecycle and scanning functionality.

#### This default permission set includes:

- `allow-open-camera`
- `allow-close-camera`
- `allow-start-scan`
- `allow-stop-scan`
- `allow-check-permissions`
- `allow-request-permissions`
- `allow-open-app-settings`
